title: Go project scaffold: go mod init, cobra CLI, SQLite driver, basic HTTP server
completion_summary: Go module scaffolded at observer/ (module github.com/hermes-apprentice/observer, go 1.26.3). cobra-based CLI with `serve` (flags: --listen, --hermes-db, --observer-db) and `version` subcommands. Basic HTTP server on :8080 with GET /healthz (returns ok) and GET /records (stub returning []). slog JSON logging to stderr. SIGINT/SIGTERM graceful shutdown with 5s timeout. Binary builds clean on host (Go 1.26.3, linux/amd64), --help/--version/serve --help all render correctly. SQLite driver pulled in by subtask_02 — modernc.org/sqlite chosen for pure-Go portability so the host-built binary runs on Debian-bookworm-slim in the VM without CGO/glibc concerns. Deliverables: observer/go.mod, observer/main.go, observer/cmd/{root,serve,version}.go, observer/internal/httpapi/server.go.
